mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_correction_case ( correction_case_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, source_review_case_id, source_review_decision_id, source_evidence_set_snapshot_id, source_snapshot_content_digest, reason_codes, status, created_by, created_at, latest_resubmission_snapshot_id, closed_by, closed_at, correction_task_id) VALUES ( CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{sourceReviewCaseId} AS uuid), CAST(#{sourceReviewDecisionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{sourceEvidenceSetSnapshotId} AS uuid), #{sourceSnapshotContentDigest}, CAST(#{reasonCodes} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, CAST(#{latestResubmissionSnapshotId} AS uuid), #{closedBy}, #{closedAt}, CAST(#{correctionTaskId} AS uuid))

INSERT INTO evd_correction_resubmission ( correction_resubmission_id, tenant_id, project_id, correction_case_id, resubmission_ordinal, evidence_set_snapshot_id, snapshot_content_digest, submitted_by, submitted_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{correctionResubmissionId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid), #{resubmissionOrdinal}, CAST(#{evidenceSetSnapshotId} AS uuid), #{snapshotContentDigest}, #{submittedBy}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE evd_correction_case SET correction_task_id = CAST(#{correctionTaskId} AS uuid) WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction_case_id = CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid) AND correction_task_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT correction_case_id AS "correctionCaseId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", source_review_decision_id AS "sourceReviewDecisionId", source_evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "sourceEvidenceSetSnapshotId", source_snapshot_content_digest AS "sourceSnapshotContentDigest", reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", correction_task_id AS "correctionTaskId", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", latest_resubmission_snapshot_id AS "latestResubmissionSnapshotId", closed_by AS "closedBy", closed_at AS "closedAt", waived_by AS "waivedBy", waived_at AS "waivedAt", waive_approval_ref AS "waiveApprovalRef", waive_note AS "waiveNote" FROM evd_correction_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction_case_id = CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid)

SELECT correction_case_id AS "correctionCaseId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", source_review_decision_id AS "sourceReviewDecisionId", source_evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "sourceEvidenceSetSnapshotId", source_snapshot_content_digest AS "sourceSnapshotContentDigest", reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", correction_task_id AS "correctionTaskId", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", latest_resubmission_snapshot_id AS "latestResubmissionSnapshotId", closed_by AS "closedBy", closed_at AS "closedAt", waived_by AS "waivedBy", waived_at AS "waivedAt", waive_approval_ref AS "waiveApprovalRef", waive_note AS "waiveNote" FROM evd_correction_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC, correction_case_id ASC

SELECT correction_case_id AS "correctionCaseId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", source_review_decision_id AS "sourceReviewDecisionId", source_evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "sourceEvidenceSetSnapshotId", source_snapshot_content_digest AS "sourceSnapshotContentDigest", reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", correction_task_id AS "correctionTaskId", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", latest_resubmission_snapshot_id AS "latestResubmissionSnapshotId", closed_by AS "closedBy", closed_at AS "closedAt", waived_by AS "waivedBy", waived_at AS "waivedAt", waive_approval_ref AS "waiveApprovalRef", waive_note AS "waiveNote" FROM evd_correction_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction_task_id = CAST(#{correctionTaskId} AS uuid)

SELECT correction.correction_case_id AS "correctionCaseId", correction.project_id AS "projectId", correction.task_id AS "taskId", correction.source_review_case_id AS "sourceReviewCaseId", correction.source_review_decision_id AS "sourceReviewDecisionId", correction.reason_codes::text AS "reasonCodes", correction.correction_task_id AS "correctionTaskId", correction.status AS "status", correction.created_at AS "createdAt", correction.latest_resubmission_snapshot_id AS "latestResubmissionSnapshotId", correction.closed_at AS "closedAt", correction.waived_at AS "waivedAt", COALESCE(rounds.resubmission_count, 0) AS "resubmissionCount" FROM evd_correction_case correction LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS resubmission_count FROM evd_correction_resubmission WHERE tenant_id = correction.tenant_id AND correction_case_id = correction.correction_case_id ) rounds ON true WHERE correction.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction.status = #{status}
AND correction.project_id IN
CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid)
AND 1 = 0
AND correction.task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid)
AND correction.source_review_case_id = CAST(#{sourceReviewCaseId} AS uuid)
AND (correction.created_at, correction.correction_case_id) > (#{cursorCreatedAt}, CAST(#{cursorId} AS uuid))
ORDER BY correction.created_at, correction.correction_case_id LIMIT #{fetchSize}
SELECT correction_case_id::text FROM evd_correction_case WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND source_review_decision_id = CAST(#{reviewDecisionId} AS uuid)

SELECT correction_resubmission_id AS "correctionResubmissionId", correction_case_id AS "correctionCaseId", resubmission_ordinal AS "resubmissionOrdinal", evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "evidenceSetSnapshotId", snapshot_content_digest AS "snapshotContentDigest", submitted_by AS "submittedBy", submitted_at AS "submittedAt" FROM evd_correction_resubmission WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction_case_id = CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid) ORDER BY resubmission_ordinal
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(resubmission_ordinal), 0) FROM evd_correction_resubmission WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND correction_case_id = CAST(#{correctionCaseId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_correction_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, result_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{resultId} AS uuid))
